languages.text: "Прочешите заставу. Если кто-то из людей Гапраков добрался сюда с вестями, но так и не вышел за пределы меровского поста, вы должны это установить. Не доверяю я этим служивым: от Астра Милитарум у них одна форма. Надеюсь, вы отыщете следы — иначе придется заподозрить худшее: измену самих Гапраков".

traits.locale_text: "Прочешите заставу. Если кто-то из людей Гапраков добрался сюда с вестями, но так и не вышел за пределы меровского поста, вы должны это установить. Не доверяю я этим служивым: от Астра Милитарум у них одна форма. Надеюсь, вы отыщете следы — иначе придется заподозрить худшее: измену самих Гапраков".

languages.text: "Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope your search turns up something, or we will have to suspect the worst: that the Gapraks themselves have betrayed us."
languages.original_text: "Прочешите заставу. Если кто-то из людей Гапраков добрался сюда с вестями, но так и не вышел за пределы меровского поста, вы должны это установить. Не доверяю я этим служивым: от Астра Милитарум у них одна форма. Надеюсь, вы отыщете следы — иначе придется заподозрить худшее: измену самих Гапраков".

traits.locale_text: "Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope your search turns up something, or we will have to suspect the worst: that the Gapraks themselves have betrayed us."

"Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope your search turns up something, or we will have to suspect the worst: that the Gapraks themselves have betrayed us."

"Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope you don't find anything, though, or we will have to suspect the worst: treason."

"Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope your search turns up something, or we will have to suspect the worst: that the Gapraks themselves have betrayed us."

"Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope your search turns up something, or we will have to suspect the worst: that the Gapraks themselves have betrayed us."

languages.text: "Durchkämmt jeden Winkel des Außenpostens. Findet heraus, ob Vertreter von Haus Gaprak hier mit Nachrichten angekommen sind, aber nie über den Außenposten der Merovianer hinauskamen. Ich traue diesen Soldaten nicht. Sie gehören nur der Uniform nach dem Astra Militarum an. Ich hoffe, Eure Suche ist erfolgreich, sonst müssen wir vom Schlimmsten ausgehen: dass uns die Gaprak selbst verraten haben."
languages.original_text: "Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope your search turns up something, or we will have to suspect the worst: that the Gapraks themselves have betrayed us."

traits.locale_text: "Durchkämmt jeden Winkel des Außenpostens. Findet heraus, ob Vertreter von Haus Gaprak hier mit Nachrichten angekommen sind, aber nie über den Außenposten der Merovianer hinauskamen. Ich traue diesen Soldaten nicht. Sie gehören nur der Uniform nach dem Astra Militarum an. Ich hoffe, Eure Suche ist erfolgreich, sonst müssen wir vom Schlimmsten ausgehen: dass uns die Gaprak selbst verraten haben."

languages.text: “把前哨彻底搜查一遍。你必须查清楚，是否有贾帕克家族的人带着消息来到这里，却没能走出梅罗夫人的前哨。我不信任那些士兵，他们也就身上那套制服像星界军。希望你能有所发现，否则我们不得不做最糟糕的打算：贾帕克家族背叛了我们。”
languages.original_text: "Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope your search turns up something, or we will have to suspect the worst: that the Gapraks themselves have betrayed us."

traits.locale_text: “把前哨彻底搜查一遍。你必须查清楚，是否有贾帕克家族的人带着消息来到这里，却没能走出梅罗夫人的前哨。我不信任那些士兵，他们也就身上那套制服像星界军。希望你能有所发现，否则我们不得不做最糟糕的打算：贾帕克家族背叛了我们。”

languages.text: « Fouillez l'avant-poste de fond en comble. Si des membres de la maison Gaprak ont été envoyés livrer un message, mais qu'ils n'ont jamais dépassé l'avant-poste merovien, vous devez le découvrir. Je ne fais pas confiance à ces soldats : ils n'ont de l'Astra Militarum que l'uniforme. J'espère que vos recherches porteront leurs fruits, sans quoi nous devrons craindre le pire : les Gaprak nous ont trahis. »
languages.original_text: "Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope your search turns up something, or we will have to suspect the worst: that the Gapraks themselves have betrayed us."

traits.locale_text: « Fouillez l'avant-poste de fond en comble. Si des membres de la maison Gaprak ont été envoyés livrer un message, mais qu'ils n'ont jamais dépassé l'avant-poste merovien, vous devez le découvrir. Je ne fais pas confiance à ces soldats : ils n'ont de l'Astra Militarum que l'uniforme. J'espère que vos recherches porteront leurs fruits, sans quoi nous devrons craindre le pire : les Gaprak nous ont trahis. »

languages.text: «Peine hasta el último centímetro del puesto avanzado. Averigüe si algún emisario de la casa Gaprak vino con noticias, pero no llegó a salir del puesto avanzado meroviano. No confío en esos soldados: lo único que tienen del Astra Militarum es el uniforme. Espero que descubra algo, porque de lo contrario tendremos que plantearnos el peor caso posible: traición por parte de los Gaprak».
languages.original_text: "Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope your search turns up something, or we will have to suspect the worst: that the Gapraks themselves have betrayed us."

traits.locale_text: «Peine hasta el último centímetro del puesto avanzado. Averigüe si algún emisario de la casa Gaprak vino con noticias, pero no llegó a salir del puesto avanzado meroviano. No confío en esos soldados: lo único que tienen del Astra Militarum es el uniforme. Espero que descubra algo, porque de lo contrario tendremos que plantearnos el peor caso posible: traición por parte de los Gaprak».

languages.text: "Karakolun her santimi araştırılmalı. Eğer Gaprak Hanesi'nden birileri haber getirdiyse ama Merov karakolunu geçemediyse bunu bilmek gerek. O askerlere güvenmiyorum: Sadece üniformalı Astra Militarum'durlar. Umarım aramadan bir şey çıkar yoksa en kötüsünden şüphelenmek zorunda kalacağız: Gaprakların bizzat bize ihanet ettiğinden."
languages.original_text: "Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope your search turns up something, or we will have to suspect the worst: that the Gapraks themselves have betrayed us."

traits.locale_text: "Karakolun her santimi araştırılmalı. Eğer Gaprak Hanesi'nden birileri haber getirdiyse ama Merov karakolunu geçemediyse bunu bilmek gerek. O askerlere güvenmiyorum: Sadece üniformalı Astra Militarum'durlar. Umarım aramadan bir şey çıkar yoksa en kötüsünden şüphelenmek zorunda kalacağız: Gaprakların bizzat bize ihanet ettiğinden."

languages.text: 「この要塞の隅々まで調べなさい。ギャプラク家の者たちが、ここで消息を伝えようとしていたが、メロヴィアンの要塞を突破できなかったならば、必ず見つけ出せ。私はその兵士たちを信用していない。彼らは軍服を着ただけで、アストラ・ミリタラムではない。君の捜索で何かが見つかることを願う。そうでなければ、最悪の事態を疑わなければならない。ギャプラク家が自分たちで裏切ったのだ。」
languages.original_text: "Comb every inch of the outpost. If any of the House Gaprak people arrived here with news, but never got past the Merovian outpost, you must find out. I do not trust those soldiers: they are Astra Militarum in uniform only. I hope your search turns up something, or we will have to suspect the worst: that the Gapraks themselves have betrayed us."
